columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Timestamp when the event was ingested into Microsoft Sentinel (clamped to 2-day maximum lookback)

columns.name: eventTime
columns.description: Original event timestamp from Mimecast in ISO 8601 format

columns.name: mimecastEventType
columns.description: Mimecast event type discriminator (e.g. ttp_url, ttp_attachment, ttp_impersonation, seg_cg, seg_dlp, audit, cloud_integrated, awareness_performance_detail, awareness_safe_score_detail, awareness_user_data, awareness_watchlist_detail)

columns.name: mimecastEventId
columns.description: Unique Mimecast event identifier used for read-time deduplication

columns.name: mimecast_body
columns.description: Full Mimecast event payload serialized as JSON string; parse with todynamic() to access nested fields

columns.name: senderAddress
columns.description: Sender email address (senderAddress / senderEnvelope / fromUserEmailAddress depending on event type)

columns.name: recipientAddress
columns.description: Recipient email address (recipientAddress / userEmailAddress depending on event type)

columns.name: subject
columns.description: Email subject line

columns.name: action
columns.description: Action taken by Mimecast (Allow, Block, Hold, etc.)

columns.name: messageId
columns.description: Email message ID

columns.name: route
columns.description: Email route direction (inbound, outbound, internal)

columns.name: url
columns.description: URL inspected — populated for ttp_url events

columns.name: fileHash
columns.description: File hash (SHA256/MD5) — populated for ttp_attachment events

columns.name: fileName
columns.description: Attachment file name — populated for ttp_attachment events

columns.name: scanResult
columns.description: Scan result verdict (malicious, clean, etc.) — populated for TTP and SEG events

columns.name: senderIp
columns.description: Sender or sending IP address

columns.name: auditType
columns.description: Audit event sub-type — populated for audit events

columns.name: accountId
columns.description: Mimecast account/tenant identifier

columns.name: aggregateId
columns.description: SEG aggregate/event group identifier. NOTE: aggregateId groups multiple rows into one logical event — it is NOT the unique dedup key. Use mimecastEventId (= processingId for SEG) for deduplication.

columns.name: mimecastLogtype
columns.description: SEG Logtype discriminator extracted from payload. Known values: email_receipt, email_process, email_spam, email_ttp_ap (attachment-protect rows routed to TTP parser). Empty for non-SEG event types.

columns.name: mimecastSubtype
columns.description: SEG subtype field extracted from payload. Empty for non-SEG event types.

columns.name: impersonationResults
columns.description: Array of impersonation check results for ttp_impersonation events. Each element contains impersonationDomainSource, similarDomain, checkerResult. Use mv-expand impersonationResults in queries to flatten. Null for all other event types.
